## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.4

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Restores normal device-state loading during startup so battery, RF/radio level, report time, temperature, humidity, and smoke detector entities are created again before Home Assistant sets up the platforms.
- Keeps existing entities available when X-Sense returns the same physical station or child device under a different ID alias after refresh.
- Uses Home Assistant's thread-safe task scheduling path for deferred refresh and MQTT disconnect cleanup.
